title: Make the specialized self-hosted macOS CI lane manual-only so repositories without registered macOS runners do not queue it on every main push
description: Make the specialized self-hosted macOS CI lane manual-only so repositories without registered macOS runners do not queue it on every main push
no_spec_change_rationale: This changes only CI trigger governance and immutable action references; it does not alter the Android catalog contract or product behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The macOS self-hosted workflow exposes workflow_dispatch only and cannot queue from a main push; comments accurately describe manual operation and zero registered runners; every touched action is pinned to an immutable commit; actionlint
